name: sphinx-thebe

metadata.name: sphinx-thebe
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Integrate interactive code blocks into your documentation with Thebe and Binder.

documentation:
# sphinx-thebe

[![Documentation](https://readthedocs.org/projects/sphinx-thebe/badge/?version=latest)](https://sphinx-thebe.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?badge=latest)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/sphinx-thebe.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/sphinx-thebe)

Integrate interactive code blocks into your documentation with Thebe and Binder.

See [the sphinx-thebe documentation](https://sphinx-thebe.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) for more details!

## Install

To install `sphinx-thebe` first clonse and install it:

```
pip install sphinx-thebe
```

Then, add it to your Sphinx site's `conf.py` file:

```
extensions = [
    ...
    "sphinx_thebe"
    ...
]
```

See [the sphinx-thebe documentation](https://sphinx-thebe.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) for more details!

modules.name: sphinx_thebe._version
documentation: don't change, don't track in version control

modules.name: sphinx_thebe
documentation: A sphinx extension to enable interactive computations using thebe.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe.init_thebe_default_config
documentation: Create a default config for fields that aren't given by the user.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe._do_load_thebe
documentation: Decide whether to load thebe based on the page's context.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe.init_thebe_core
documentation:
Add scripts to configure thebe, and optionally add thebe itself.

By default, defer loading the `thebe` JS bundle until bootstrap is called
in order to speed up page load times.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe.update_thebe_context
documentation: Add thebe config nodes to this doctree using page-dependent information.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe._split_repo_url
documentation: Split a repository URL into an org / repo combination.

functions.name: sphinx_thebe.visit_element_html
documentation: Used to render an element node as HTML

functions.name: sphinx_thebe.skip
documentation: Used for nodes that do not need to be rendered

classes.name: sphinx_thebe.ThebeButtonNode
documentation:
Appended to the doctree by the ThebeButton directive

Renders as a button to enable thebe on the page.

If no ThebeButton directive is found in the document but thebe
is enabled, the node is added at the bottom of the document.

classes.name: sphinx_thebe.ThebeButton
documentation:
Specify a button to activate thebe on the page

Arguments
---------
text : str (optional)
    If provided, the button text to display

Content
-------
None
